title: デビュー戦の後に・ぐるぐるばったん

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto successfully finishes her debut—but
pushes herself to the limit doing so, collapsing
shortly after.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A shocking truth is revealed at the infirmary.
Meisho Doto has yet to enter her race-ready
state.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The race-ready state is an Umamusume's period
of growth, so it's understandable that
prematurely exerting herself would have this
effect.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite the revelation, Meisho Doto can't find it
in her heart to give up. Slowly but surely, we'll
build up her racing experience.
